initialBlackMs.label: Void
initialBlackMs.hint: the darkness it is born out of

splitBlackMs.label: Blink
splitBlackMs.hint: a held breath of black before the spark

creationSpeed.label: Urgency
creationSpeed.hint: how fast the birth unfolds (1 = as authored)

crBlast.label: Blast
crBlast.hint: how it explodes — 0 classic · 1 cone · 2 shockwave · 3 shards · 4 lightning · 5 nova

crIgnition.label: Ignition
crIgnition.hint: how violent the birth — flares the flash, rays and rings at once

crCoreSize.label: Seed
crCoreSize.hint: the white-hot core it grows from

crRayLength.label: Reach
crRayLength.hint: how far the blast throws out

crShards.label: Shards
crShards.hint: flying fragments thrown by the blast (the Shards mode)

crRingExpand.label: Shockwave
crRingExpand.hint: how far the shock rings ride out

splashSpeed.label: Patience
splashSpeed.hint: how slowly the two draw together (1 = as authored)

spForm.label: Form
spForm.hint: what it resolves into — 0 ring · 1 polygon · 2 star · 3 slit · 4 lens · 5 lattice · 6 spiral · 7 cross

spSides.label: Facets
spSides.hint: the Form's detail — sides / points / grid / turns

spCoreDiameter.label: Scale
spCoreDiameter.hint: the size of the resolved Form

spDiskSize.label: Halo
spDiskSize.hint: a glow that haloes the Form

spBeams.label: Beams
spBeams.hint: slices of light radiating from the centre

spSweep.label: Sweep
spSweep.hint: how fast the beams and Form rotate

spNeon.label: Neon
spNeon.hint: glow + weight of the light (beams + Form)

spFlux.label: Flux
spFlux.hint: how hard the field winds inward toward the Form

spPulse.label: Heartbeat
spPulse.hint: pulse the whole field's radius rhythmically

spSparkle.label: Sparkle
spSparkle.hint: a light dust accent (capped — kept snappy)

spTexture.label: Texture
spTexture.hint: one knob, chained: smooth → water → flame → crumble → disintegrate

spDriftOut.label: Dusk
spDriftOut.hint: how it ends — collapse inward (−) · settle (0) · fly apart (+)

spMandala.label: Mandala
spMandala.hint: kaleidoscopic geometry — mirror the whole field into N-fold symmetry

spWarmth.label: Mood
spWarmth.hint: warm gold ↔ cool sparkle (the dust accent)

spDustTrail.label: Memory
spDustTrail.hint: motion-smear instead of clearing each frame

spTurb.label: Turbulence
spTurb.hint: chaos — restless jitter through the field and Form

spDawn.label: Dawn
spDawn.hint: how it starts — gather slowly from far, scattered

spDustSize.label: Grain
spDustSize.hint: the size of each dust mote

creationBeatMs.label: Threshold
creationBeatMs.hint: how long the First burns before the Last begins

creationToSplashMs.label: Seam
creationToSplashMs.hint: overlap of the two — negative = no black gap

splashHoldMs.label: Dwell
splashHoldMs.hint: how long the Last lingers before it ends
